channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Power cuts in France leave thousands sweltering
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- France suffers power outages, drownings in historic heat wave
- Major power outage in France as Europe wilts under record heat
- Power outage in France as Europe bakes in record heat
- France heatwave's first major outage leaves 68,000 homes without power
- Flash: Heatwave forces power cuts to 68,000 homes in western France: media
- Power cuts in France leave thousands sweltering amid scorching heatwave
- France outage leaves 68,000 homes without power as record heatwave spreads north
- France heatwave's first major outage leaves 68,000 homes without power
- Major power outage in France as Europe wilts under record heat
- Power cuts in France leave thousands sweltering amid scorching heatwave]]>

Matched Titles:
- France confirms, isolates five possible contacts of Ebola patient

- France confirms Ebola virus in doctor who worked in Congo
- France Confirms Its First Ebola Case Connected to African Outbreak
- France identifies first case of ebola
- France confirms 1st Ebola case linked to outbreak in the DRC
- France Identifies First Case of Ebola
- France confirms Ebola virus in patient who worked in Congo
- France confirms first Ebola case in doctor who had worked in DRC
- France Identifies First Case of Ebola
- France confirms first Ebola case, found in doctor who flew back from Congo
- Urgent: First Ebola case confirmed in France after doctor returns from DRC -- media
- First Ebola case confirmed in France after doctor returns from DRC]]>
